title: Rane Music's Recovered Music Discs
description: Changes almost all of the music discs into rane music's fnaf metal cover
body:
# 🎧 Info:

This is just a random, fun little project I made because I couldn’t get **Rane Music’s amazing covers** out of my head.

This resource pack replaces *all vanilla Minecraft music discs* with hand-picked **Rane Music covers**  mostly from his FNaF series, but the spotlight here is **Rane’s work**, not the games themselves. The goal? Turn your jukebox into a concert hall for his music.

No fancy models or extra features. Just:

* Insert disc.
* Get hit with pure Rane.
* Jam.
* Retexturing to music discs

Whether you're chilling in your survival world or building a spooky map, this pack gives your Minecraft soundtrack a powerful, emotional upgrade  powered by the one and only **Rane**.



# 🛠️ Requirements (Important!)

![Required Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d248bab6533193b034d79831e4a5d5100f1921b.png)

To get the full experience, you’ll need the mod:
👉 [**Jukebox Custom Disc Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix)

Why? Minecraft cuts off custom disc sounds early (thanks to a bug), and **Rane's covers deserve to play in full**.
This mod fixes that by allowing longer music to play without getting rudely cut short.

It’s a *client-side* mod, so no need for a server install. Just drop it into your mods folder and you’re good.

# 💿 What’s Included:

* All vanilla discs replaced (yes, even *11* and *13*)
* Tracks are pulled from **Rane Music’s FNaF cover collection**
* No jumpscares  just good music

You don’t need to be a FNAF fan. If you just enjoy powerful, cinematic covers with emotion and polish, this pack is for you.



# 🙏 Credits:



**🎼 Rane Music** – All music in this pack belongs to **Rane**, an insanely talented music artist and composer.
From piano to metal, soft emotional themes to horror intensity  he’s done it all. This pack exists purely to celebrate his work.

🎥 [Rane's YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@RaneMusic)
Go listen, subscribe, and show love. I don’t own any of the music  I’m just a fan who wanted to experience it through Minecraft.



# ❓Why This Exists

No real reason. Just wanted to vibe with Rane’s music while mining diamonds.
Minecraft discs are cool, but let’s be honest  they could use a glow-up.
This is that glow-up. And the glow is called **Rane Music**.
